summary: The main character, an orc, tracks down his former nemesis, the Black Magician who has now transformed into the Lich Cardum, at his laboratory. The orc and his party face waves of undead skeletons and knights before engaging the Lich in a high-stakes battle. As the combat intensifies, the orc demonstrates immense power, leading the Lich to summon his strongest creation, a Dullahan, to turn the tide.
key_moments: The party enters Lich Cardum's laboratory and encounters a massive wave of undead skeletons and knights.
The orc identifies the sources of the Lich's power on his neck and hand and begins unleashing overwhelming sword aura.
After the orc mocks the Lich's curse, the Lich loses his composure and summons a Dullahan to destroy the intruders.
